select_subtitle: Pick the workspace you want. You can switch portal or log out from the sidebar later.
select_no_portals: No business portals are available for this account. Contact an administrator if you need Case Manager, Intended Parent, or Gestational Carrier access.

placeholder.case_manager_dashboard: Case Manager dashboard placeholder — stage overview, filters, and list routing will follow the approved PDF.
placeholder.cases_list: Cases list placeholder (e.g. filter by stage).
placeholder.admin_home: Placeholder. Menus and features will be migrated from the legacy admin app.
placeholder.intended_home: Intended parent portal placeholder — journey and case details to follow.
placeholder.surrogate_home: Gestational carrier portal placeholder — journey and case details to follow.

pages.my_cases_intro: Placeholder. process_status labels can be localized (see sample stage).

am_dash.welcome_sub: Welcome back — here’s an overview of cases by pipeline stage.
am_dash.error_unauthorized: Sign in as a Case Manager first.
am_dash.error_data: Could not load data. Try again shortly.
am_dash.my_cases_intro: All cases assigned to you as Case Manager across every pipeline stage.
am_dash.my_cases_section_note: Only cases assigned to your account (your case manager record). Filter by IP, surrogate, stage, or search.
am_dash.search_placeholder: Search case ID / case manager email / intended parent email / surrogate email

admin_dash.welcome_sub: View all cases and stage distribution.

admin_case.create_intro: Required: case manager, intended parent, surrogate, initial stage, trust balance. DB rule: each intended parent and each surrogate can only be linked to one case.
admin_case.error_create: Create failed. Check inputs and try again.
admin_case.error_unique_intended_parent: This intended parent already has a case (one case per intended parent). Choose another person or resolve the existing case.
admin_case.error_unique_surrogate: This surrogate already has a case (one case per surrogate). Choose another person or resolve the existing case.

admin_accounts.intro_bind_entity: These rows are business records. Create logins under “Account management”. For unlinked rows use Link; for linked rows use Change binding — search by email in the dialog, pick a user, then confirm.
admin_accounts.search_placeholder: Search by entity ID or email
admin_accounts.modal_intro: Search by email keyword, select a row, then confirm. Leave the field empty and search to list the most recent accounts.
admin_accounts.modal_hint_search: Enter a keyword and press Search, or search with an empty field to see recent accounts.
admin_accounts.modal_no_results: No users match. Create the account under “Account management” or try another keyword.
admin_accounts.modal_row_conflict: This account is already linked to another record of this type and cannot be used here.
admin_accounts.error_link_select_user: Select a user in the list first.
admin_accounts.error_link_user_not_found: No user with that email. Create the account under “Account management” first.
admin_accounts.error_link_entity_not_found: That business record was not found.
admin_accounts.error_link_user_conflict: That login is already linked to another record of this type.

admin_users.title: Account management
admin_users.subtitle: Manage login accounts here; link rows to business entities from the Case manager / Intended parent / Surrogate sidebar lists.
admin_users.ph_password_optional: New password to reset; leave blank to keep
admin_users.bind_already: This user already has that role.
admin_users.error_create: Create failed. Check input and try again.

workflow.bad_process_status: This case’s process_status in the database is not one of the canonical English stage names, so the flow cannot advance. In Hasura, set process_status to one of: {{stages}}
workflow.missing_fields_hint: This stage has {{total}} configured fields; {{count}} are still empty (counts after values are saved):
workflow.scroll_more_fields: The form can be long—scroll down, fill every field, then use “Next stage”.

case_detail.subtitle: Maintain per-stage AM fields from the workbook, plus parties, milestones, and case files.
case_detail.error_unauthorized: Sign in with Case Manager access first.
case_detail.error_not_found: Case not found or you cannot access it.

am_workspace.section_intro: Eleven canonical stages appear on the left; you can revisit completed stages. Later stages stay locked until the case advances. All required fields in the current stage must be filled before moving on.
am_workspace.empty_fields: No fields are configured for this stage.
am_workspace.next_hint_incomplete: Finish every required field in this stage. You can submit with “Advance” — your edits are merged for this request.
am_workspace.error_incomplete: Some required fields are still empty.
am_workspace.error_bad_flow: process_status is not on the canonical pipeline, so the case cannot be advanced.
am_workspace.error_advance_conflict: When advancing, edits must target the current stage only. Switch back to the current stage.
am_workspace.error_stage_locked: That stage is not open yet.
am_workspace.error_bad_request: Invalid request. Refresh and try again.
am_workspace.upload_error: Upload failed. Check your connection or verify Qiniu settings with an admin.
am_workspace.url_placeholder: Filled after upload, or paste a URL
am_workspace.url_hint: Files go to Qiniu via the portal-issued upload URL and credentials; you can paste an existing URL instead.
